## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Otto and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website updates, and marketing operations.](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to deliver 3 blog posts next week, ramping up to 5 per week thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Otto to implement table of contents on blog posts for improved user experience and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Looker Dashboard set up for Otto to track website performance and content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of high-authority travel bloggers for Otto's outreach efforts](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Calibration blog post ready for review; Otto team to provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [GrowthX adapting to shorter, more focused artifacts for better LLM output](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Goal: 3 blog posts next week, increasing to 5 per week](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Emphasis on comprehensive, original content to build website authority](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Suggestion to create industry statistics compilations for backlink generation](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Website Development

  - [Otto implemented basic blog template; GrowthX recommends adding table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Jason to create a dedicated blog listing page](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Discussion on separating app data from static website analytics](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Looker Dashboard set up with Google Analytics and Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Key metrics: sessions, engaged sessions, landing page performance, conversion events](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Content performance tracking to be implemented once GrowthX posts are live](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [LLM referral report shows traffic from AI platforms (e.g., ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

### Marketing Operations

  - [Social shares don't directly impact website authority but help with distribution](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Press launch planned in next 4 weeks; Otto reaching out to tech and travel publications](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of 20-30 high-authority travel bloggers for Otto's outreach](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Discussion on potential future use of review platforms like G2 or Trustpilot](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to create dedicated blog listing page](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [GrowthX to start work on 3 new blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of high-authority travel bloggers for Otto's outreach](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate Looker Dashboard filtering to separate app data from static website data](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Otto to proceed with press outreach for upcoming launch](https://fathom.video/share/VE7ATRJnHzzY5deTCtptA8sZ8KM57Lt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
